claim_metrics.complaints_metric_unit: per 10,000 policyholders (derived: 1,456 complaints / 14.79M lives covered ≈ 1 per 10K)
claim_metrics.notes: Oriental Insurance is a public-sector general insurer. CSR 93.96% per IRDAI 2023-24 aggregated by PolicyX. ICR 98.89% (near break-even on premium-vs-claims). FY24-25 CSR per IRDAI 2026 release = 90.17%. Complaints: Oriental Insurance grievance/complaint tables for FY 2024-25 (1,456 complaints against 14.79M lives covered, ≈10 per 100K policyholders or ~1 per 10K) sourced from the IRDAI Annual Report 2024-25 (official irdai.gov.in PDF, 416 pp; grievance tables ~p.382). Backfilled 2026-05-15 in targeted scrape pass; complaints source URL repaired 2026-05-16 — was: https://www.insurancebusinessmag.com/asia/news/life-insurance/latest-india-data-finds-complaints-clustered-in-insurance-segment-565197.aspx (403 Cloudflare-blocked 2026-05-16; that page was a secondary aggregation of this same IRDAI report).
